name: Ceramic Table Lamp with Knob (Includes LED Light Bulb) Tan - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description: Add a graceful look to your home by illuminating with the Ceramic Table Lamp with Knob from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This tan table lamp stands on a cylindrical base with decorative knobs on both sides, and features an empire shade for a modern appeal. A gold-tone neck and finial joins the base with the shade and adds a touch of luxury you'll love. Easy to turn on and off with one-way light setting, this ceramic table lamp has a rocker switch on the cord for added convenience.
